description: An internal audit has found a recurring process failure. A quality manager needs to initiate a formal Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA) request.

nodes.task_description: Create a new CAPA record, referencing the internal audit finding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new CAPA and links it to the specific audit report.

nodes.task_description: Define the problem statement and assign a cross-functional team to investigate the root cause.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear problem statement and assigns the investigation to the appropriate personnel.

nodes.task_description: Set a due date for the root cause analysis phase of the CAPA.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets a deadline for the investigation team to report its findings.
